parameters.jsCode:
const jobs = $input.all() || []; const rows = jobs.map((job, i) => ` ${job.json['Company Name'] || ''} ${job.json['Role Title'] || ''} ${job.json['Location'] || ''}${job.json['Work Mode'] === 'Remote' ? ' 🌐' : ''} ${job.json['Salary Range'] || 'N/A'} ${job.json['Source'] || ''} Apply Resume Cover Letter `).join(''); const html = `

🎯 ${jobs.length} Jobs Ready to Apply

Your AI-tailored resume and cover letter are ready for each role below. Click Apply, attach your documents and submit!

${rows}
Company Role Location Salary Source Actions

Generated by AI Resume Optimizer • ${new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US',{month:'short',day:'numeric',year:'numeric'})}

`; return [{ json: { html, total: jobs.length } }];

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.total }} Jobs Ready to Apply — {{ $now.toFormat('MMM dd, yyyy') }}

nodes.name: If Already Applied to the Job

=
📭

No New Jobs Today

📅  Scan date {{ $now.toFormat('MMM dd, yyyy') }}
🔍  Status All jobs already tracked
⚡  Next scan Tomorrow at 7:00 AM

This is an automated message from your n8n job tracker.
No action needed.

AI Job Tracker  ·  {{ $now.toFormat('yyyy') }}

nodes.name: Send No New Jobs Found Email

parameters.jsonBody:
=={{ JSON.stringify({
  model: "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001",
  max_tokens: 150,
  messages: [{
    role: "user",
    content: "You are a precise job relevance filter for a software engineer. Analyze the job and decide if it is worth applying to.

CANDIDATE PROFILE:
Experience: 3 years as software engineer.
Core Stack: React, TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Node.js, NestJS, Next.js
Cloud & DevOps: GCP, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, GKE, Helm, NGINX, CI/CD, GitHub Actions
Databases: MongoDB, Cassandra, Redis, SQL
Other: REST APIs, JWT, Agile, TDD, Jest, SonarQube, Postman
Education: MS Computer Science (GPA 4.0), BS CS Engineering
Target: Entry level, junior, associate, new grad, SDE-1, 0-3 years roles

IMPLICIT SKILLS — count these as known without needing to be listed:
HTML, CSS, Git, Linux, bash, JSON, HTTP/HTTPS, OAuth, OOP, MVC, data structures, algorithms, debugging, unit testing, code review, Agile, Scrum, SDLC, microservices concepts, web fundamentals, REST design, API integration, cloud basics, SQL basics, CI/CD concepts

HARD DISQUALIFIERS — mark NOT relevant if ANY of these are true:
- Primary language is Java, C#, .NET, C++, Ruby, PHP, Golang, Rust, Scala, Kotlin AND none of JavaScript, Python, TypeScript, Node are mentioned anywhere in the JD
- Role is primarily iOS or Android native mobile development
- Role is embedded systems, firmware, hardware, FPGA, or robotics
- Role explicitly requires 5+ years of experience
- Role title contains Senior, Staff, Principal, Lead, Architect, Manager, Director, VP, Head of
- Role is purely data science, data engineering, or ML research with no software engineering component
- Role requires active US security clearance

SOFT DISQUALIFIERS — these reduce relevance but do not alone disqualify:
- Uses some Java or C# but also requires JavaScript, Python, or TypeScript — still RELEVANT
- Requires a framework the candidate hasn't used (Vue, Angular, Django, Spring) but the underlying language matches — still RELEVANT, frameworks are learnable
- Mentions preferred skills the candidate lacks — preferred is not required, still RELEVANT

RELEVANCE THRESHOLD — 60-70% match required:
Step 1: List all REQUIRED skills from the JD (ignore preferred/nice-to-have).
Step 2: Count how many the candidate covers including implicit skills.
Step 3: Calculate the percentage.
- 70%+ match = definitely RELEVANT
- 60-69% match = RELEVANT if no hard disqualifiers and role is entry/junior/associate level
- Below 60% = NOT relevant unless the candidate's core stack (React, TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Node.js) is the primary stack of the job

IMPORTANT NUANCE:
- A job asking for React OR Angular OR Vue = counts as candidate knows it (React)
- A job asking for Node OR Django OR Flask = counts as candidate knows it (Node + Flask)
- A job asking for AWS OR GCP OR Azure = counts as candidate knows it (AWS + GCP)
- A job asking for any SQL database = counts as candidate knows it
- A job asking for any NoSQL database = counts as candidate knows it (MongoDB, Cassandra, Redis)
- A job that lists Java as a plus but JavaScript as primary = RELEVANT
- Frameworks built on a language the candidate knows = learnable, count as partial match
- A vague JD with no specific stack but role is software engineer at a tech company = RELEVANT if no hard disqualifiers

Respond with ONLY valid JSON. No other text. No explanation.
Format: {"relevant": true} or {"relevant": false}

Job Title: " + $json.title + "
Job Description: " + ($json.description || '').substring(0, 1000)
  }]
}) }}

main.node: If Already Applied to the Job
Send No New Jobs Found Email
